name: General Reject
description: ECU rejected the request without a specific reason.

name: Service Not Supported
description: Requested UDS service is not supported by ECU.

name: Sub-function Not Supported
description: Requested subfunction is not supported.

name: Incorrect Message Length Or Invalid Format
description: Message length or structure is incorrect.

name: Busy Repeat Request
description: ECU is busy processing another request.

name: Conditions Not Correct
description: Required ECU conditions are not satisfied.

name: Request Out Of Range
description: Requested parameter or identifier is not available.

name: Security Access Denied
description: Security access request was rejected.

name: Invalid Key
description: Security key sent by tester is incorrect.

name: Exceeded Number Of Attempts
description: Too many failed security attempts.

name: Required Time Delay Not Expired
description: Security delay timer is still active.

name: Response Pending
description: ECU is still processing request.

name: Response Too Long
description: The ECU cannot send the requested response because it exceeds the available transport/protocol length.
commonCause: Response record exceeds ECU transport capability
solution: Request fewer DIDs at a time

name: Request Sequence Error
description: The request is out of order for the active diagnostic sequence.
commonCause: Transfer service used before transfer was started
solution: Check the active session and transfer state

name: Upload Download Not Accepted
description: The ECU did not accept the requested upload or download operation.
solution: Verify programming session, address, size, voltage, and security state

name: Transfer Data Suspended
description: The ECU suspended an active data transfer.
solution: Follow the OEM recovery procedure before retrying the transfer

name: General Programming Failure
description: A programming-related operation failed in the ECU.
solution: Stop the procedure safely and follow the approved ECU recovery process

name: Wrong Block Sequence Counter
description: The TransferData block sequence counter is not the value expected by the ECU.
commonCause: Skipped, repeated, or out-of-order transfer block
solution: Use the expected counter and restart transfer only as defined by the programming procedure

name: Sub-function Not Supported In Active Session
description: The requested sub-function is not supported in the current diagnostic session.

name: Service Not Supported In Active Session
description: The requested UDS service is not supported in the current diagnostic session.
